name: tavern-miniapp
description: AI Tavern - 角色卡聊天小程序

scripts.build:weapp: taro build --type weapp --mode development && node -e "const s='node_modules/.taro/weapp/remote';const t='dist-weapp/prebundle';if(require('fs').existsSync(s)){require('fs').cpSync(s,t,{recursive:true,force:true});console.log('prebundle copied')}"
scripts.build:weapp:prod: taro build --type weapp --mode production && node -e "const s='node_modules/.taro/weapp/remote';const t='dist-weapp/prebundle';if(require('fs').existsSync(s)){require('fs').cpSync(s,t,{recursive:true,force:true});console.log('prebundle copied')}"
scripts.predev:weapp: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const d='dist-weapp';const rm=r=>{try{fs.rmSync(r,{recursive:true,force:true})}catch(e){if(e.code==='EBUSY'){const ents=fs.readdirSync(r,{withFileTypes:true});for(const e of ents){const p=r+'/'+e.name;e.isDirectory()?rm(p):fs.unlinkSync(p)}try{fs.rmdirSync(r)}catch(e2){console.error('rmdir failed:',e2.message)}}else{console.error('rm failed:',e.message)}}};if(fs.existsSync(d)){rm(d)};const s='node_modules/.taro/weapp/remote';const t=d+'/prebundle';if(fs.existsSync(s)){fs.cpSync(s,t,{recursive:true,force:true});console.log('prebundle copied to '+t)}console.log('cleaned '+d)"
